Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:

Run ' [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage:  [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  generate      Execute manifest generators specified in your Test projects.

Run ' [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Execute manifest generators specified in your Test projects.

Usage:  generate [options]

Options:
  -path <path>             Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to
                           current directory.
  -config <configuration>  The desired project / solution configuration.
                           Defaults to Debug.
  -project <project>       A single project in the specified path to analyze.
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.

commands.payload:
Execute manifest generators specified in your Test projects.

Usage:  generate [options]

Options:
  -path <path>             Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to
                           current directory.
  -config <configuration>  The desired project / solution configuration.
                           Defaults to Debug.
  -project <project>       A single project in the specified path to analyze.
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.
